note: Every golden/replay hash declares the upstream SEMANTIC SURFACES it depends on and the surface version it was frozen against (bead y4pt). Surfaces declare a version const in source; xtask check-goldens fails when a source const drifts from this registry or a golden's pin drifts from a surface row - an upstream semantic change must point at every downstream golden to re-freeze deliberately, never surprise it. Re-pins follow docs/GOLDEN_POLICY.md (committed tree, BOTH debug and release, plausible root cause).

goldens.justification: 0xeef1_0550_7daf_c0d5 frozen 2026-07-09 after the powi build-mode fix (bead 4xnt); verified four quadrants (debug+release x aarch64+x86-64) at the committed tree. HISTORY: the 2026-07-09 re-pin to f3dcb63b wrongly blamed fs-rand d9ba0b6 (u64::MAX-boundary-only change) - the mover was optimization-dependent f64::powi in the fixture; that incident motivated this registry.

0x1d7a_a3c6_b631_7ef0 recorded at 6ys.3 landing, M4 Pro + trj; tier-invariant across the xdgf NEON capsule (bitwise-equal microkernel, verified). KC is part of the bit contract - retuning KC bumps fs-la:gemm-bits and re-freezes this.

ff9c945e8f3ecbaee37e82b5d57e7da7f710644ce9d8d0095c4974815aa132b7 deliberately re-frozen 2026-07-11 for bead j3q2: schema v2 binds the canon version, capture seed/contract/detail, distinct invariant-variant tags, explicitly framed bounded member snapshots, nonempty sealed tracking, and a domain-separated in-tree BLAKE3 identity instead of collision-prone FNV-64. The fixture remains integer/to_bits arithmetic only, so its canonical preimage is build-mode and ISA independent.

0x0377_a8c9_5992_aee9 originally frozen at 6ys.4 and registered 2026-07-10 for bug bead 9ry9. The semantic surface includes fixed per-element reduction order, beta-zero overwrite, alpha-zero no-read behavior, and batch-membership invariance; the frozen fixture uses nonzero alpha and remained unchanged in debug and release.

0x5600_7cfe_6a6d_1f9a rechecked unchanged 2026-07-10 for bug bead 9ry9: semantics v2 makes the already-promised alpha-zero path scale or overwrite C without reading poisoned A/B; the frozen fixture uses nonzero alpha, so its bits remain unchanged. The f32 and mixed chains retain the narrow-once contract; cross-ISA empirical proof remains pending the next x86 lane.

0x22dd_b617_266e_a792 (n=128, stage walk) frozen at the radix-8/4/2 bump (bead 27d3), verified four quadrants (M4 + ts2 x debug + release). UNTOUCHED by the six-step slice: dispatch is a pure function of n (asserted in-suite) and n=128 stays on the stage path. HISTORY: radix-2 0xbd55_68d2_33f4_b4bc; radix-4/2 0x0506_a4a0_955d_cf8e.

0x79aa_108f_a517_012f frozen 2026-07-10 (bead 27d3 six-step slice): n=2^16 through the radix-8/4/2 six-step arithmetic. The 2026-07-11 implementation fuses the logical three transposes, two sweeps, and copy-back into TWO parent-size full-array passes (stage A data columns -> first sweep + w^(kj) -> scratch columns; stage B scratch rows -> second sweep -> output columns) and uses twin-gated exact-move gather/scatter capsules. The storage rewrite preserved the hash on aarch64 M4 Pro in debug and release. The original arithmetic freeze was reproduced on M4 and x86-64 ts2 in debug and release; current post-fusion x86 execution remains pending and is not claimed. [F] remains default-OFF: the fully fused/vectorized path still lost to stages on M4 at n=2^22 (ratio 0.64-0.67); current x86 performance verdict pending. New bit territory, not a bump.

0xeea0_4b0a_01de_46cd re-frozen 2026-07-11 after fs-fft commit 535aa839 moved the DCT substrate from radix-4/2 to radix-8/4/2 Stockham; butterfly and twiddle order legitimately changed while the independent DCT, recovery, calculus, roots, and eigenvalue checks stayed green. Reproduced in debug and release on aarch64 M4 Pro. The upstream FFT stage path is verified four quadrants; this downstream x86-64 row remains pending RCH admission. HISTORY: radix-2 0xaee4_8002_1eea_9097 (M4 + trj); radix-4/2 0x22e7_ea21_58c9_e587 (M4 only). BOTH-ISA QUADRANT VERIFICATION COMPLETED 2026-07-11 (bead obq0): aarch64 M4 Pro debug+release, x86-64 ts1 5975WX debug+release, x86-64 ts2 5995WX release - all produce this value at HEAD; the pre-e7bad5e cross-ISA divergence (aarch64 0x22e7ea21 vs x86 0xeea04b0a at 3ff3765) was schedule disagreement resolved by the radix-8 unification.

0x4541_d7f3_2926_1082 re-frozen 2026-07-11 after fs-fft commit 535aa839 moved the DCT substrate from radix-4/2 to radix-8/4/2 Stockham. Only robust_offband moved, from 0xbf3c9a988956ba53 to 0xbf3c9a98894a2018; substituting those exact fields reconstructs the prior 0x4e42_4a53_6a63_ce8b and current aggregate, while the other five metric bits, physical envelopes, replay equality, and independent vessel/FFT checks remain unchanged. Reproduced in debug and release on aarch64 M4 Pro. The upstream FFT stage path is verified four quadrants; this downstream x86-64 row remains pending. HISTORY: radix-2 v1 0xe621_48d4_490c_a887; radix-4/2 v1 0xd70b_9ac9_0828_ae86; v2 pre-pour repair 0xdabd_6fd3_6315_31fe; radix-4/2 v2 post-repair 0x4e42_4a53_6a63_ce8b.

0xae56_945a_312e_0378 re-frozen 2026-07-10 at 6ure CLOSE: the ~1e-9 aarch64-vs-x86-64 roa divergence was platform libm (macOS vs glibc) in the fs-bem panel kernel feeding the ROA adjoint lift slope; the whole fs-bem surface (panel2d influence atan2/ln, cosine spacing, freestream trig, wake2d, panel3d probe) now routes through fs_math::det:: (surface fs-bem:panel-bits=1), so bits legitimately moved on every platform and roa (0x3fe4c1ee0bb8f1e8, identical debug+release on aarch64) is RESTORED to the hashed stream (6 metrics). Cross-ISA reproduction on ts2 recorded in the 6ure close comment. HISTORY: 5-metric envelope interim 0x1b03_ae9f_66cd_b548; divergent 6-metric v2 0xd750_e1bb_a8d7_e76a; v1 0xf513_eaf8_22d2_7813.
